title: Do you people even actually care for the characters
display_title: Do you people even actually care for the characters
wikitext:
[]: Do you people even actually care for the characters?             Quote Post by PurpleandRed » Fri Aug 07, 2015 5:25 pm Asuka seems more aloof and wise than she was in the series, which may have something to do with her being captain. She even actually condescends people, calls everyone idiots, and she seems to be more kindly here. It's just not the Asuka I know. Also, her name is changed. And is now more interested in puppets than teenage stuff despite her terrible past. Misato snorts like a bull on a window when she sees Kaji hug whatshername, which is disgusting and she also seems more tactful when it comes to arguments. Mari is not needed. Pen Pen scares Asuka out of the shower and she just stands there without hiding her private parts. Rei is a little more tough now.

[]:             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Fri Aug 07, 2015 5:37 pm She is not the Asuka you know for telling Sohryu's story over again would be pointless since we would be taught what we have already learned.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Aug 07, 2015 5:38 pm Do you people even actually care for the characters?

[]: Re: Do you people even actually care for the characters?             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Aug 07, 2015 6:08 pm PurpleandRed wrote: Mari is not needed.

[]:             Quote Post by PurpleandRed » Fri Aug 07, 2015 6:18 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: She is not the Asuka you know for telling Sohryu's story over again would be pointless since we would be taught what we have already learned.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Aug 07, 2015 6:28 pm Yes, we do care for the characters-- the testament of these forums sticking around for more than a decade is proof of that.

[]:             Quote Post by PurpleandRed » Fri Aug 07, 2015 6:31 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Yes, we do care for the characters-- the testament of these forums sticking around for more than a decade is proof of that.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 07, 2015 6:32 pm ..."you people"?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Aug 07, 2015 6:37 pm PurpleandRed wrote: I'm talknig about the Rebuild characters.

[]:             Quote Post by The Cruel » Fri Aug 07, 2015 8:42 pm I do care a lot about the characters in both NGE and Rebuild, especially for Asuka and Shinji for being the key people who have influence in the events whether they end up good or bad. Their sanity is a force to reckon with. And with Mari from Rebuild, there 'll be some free space for anything what can happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Fri Aug 07, 2015 8:51 pm The characters are what make any story, and if you are refering to Rebuilds then I would say "Yes" I do care.

[]: Re: Do you people even actually care for the characters?             Quote Post by Glor » Fri Aug 07, 2015 9:04 pm PurpleandRed wrote: Mari is not needed.

[]: Re: Do you people even actually care for the characters?             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Aug 07, 2015 10:15 pm Glor wrote: Just seems to stick out of the Evaverse like a sore thumb.

[]: Re: Do you people even actually care for the characters?             Quote Post by Glor » Fri Aug 07, 2015 10:27 pm ^I don't know. I haven't seen the interviews. If that's true, though, then I ask why?

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Fri Aug 07, 2015 11:35 pm ^ Didn't Anno say Mari was meant to "destroy Eva" in a sense? As an audience commentary, it kind of makes sense. The general audience prefers the one-dimensional, overtly busty blood knight out of nowhere and blow through the horrors of Evangelion, then the actual HUMAN characters (AKA Shinji) who struggle and more akin to real people who suffer and struggle to come out sane through these events.

[]:             Quote Post by Glor » Fri Aug 07, 2015 11:43 pm ^^ Fair enough. That does seem like something he would do.

[]: Re: Do you people even actually care for the characters?             Quote Post by Dream » Sat Aug 08, 2015 4:35 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Hugest false statement spoken on this planet within the last 24 hours, and we've had that Republican debate in that time period.

[]:             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Sat Aug 08, 2015 5:26 am What about the teamwork we see with her and Asuka in Q?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Aug 08, 2015 11:14 am People who say Anno's storytelling is him being a "troll" should punch themselves. It's the most tired, immature & ineffectual way to view filmmaking in general.

[]:             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Sat Aug 08, 2015 11:39 am After reading the definition of Troll on TV tropes, i agree

And is now more interested in puppets than teenage stuff despite her terrible past. Misato snorts like a bull on a window when she sees Kaji hug whatshername, which is disgusting and she also seems more tactful when it comes to arguments. Mari is not needed. Pen Pen scares Asuka out of the shower and she just stands there without hiding her private parts. Rei is a little more tough now.

no say Mari was meant to "destroy Eva" in a sense? As an audience commentary, it kind of makes sense. The general audience prefers the one-dimensional, overtly busty blood knight out of nowhere and blow through the horrors of Evangelion, then the actual HUMAN characters (AKA Shinji) who struggle and more akin to real people who suffer and struggle to come out sane through these events.
